title: Equity Residential (EQR) Up 6.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Equity Residential (EQR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: RPT or EQR: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the REIT and Equity Trust - Residential sector have probably already heard of RPT Realty (RPT) and Equity Residential (EQR). But which of these two stocks presents investors with the better value opportunity right now?

title: Home sales hit a 13-year low
text: Times when the market begins to send you mixed signals should not be ignored, and today, there is a huge one flashing right at you. Most investors will miss this connection, but you are not like most investors; you came to the right place to get data-driven answers for your portfolio.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Equity Residential (EQR) Stock for Now?
text: Healthy demand for residential properties and technological initiatives bode well for Equity Residential (EQR). However, the elevated supply of rental units and high interest rates are key woes.

title: Equity Residential: Low Yield, But Large Discount To NAV
text: Equity Residential is a REIT that acquires, develops, and manages residential properties all over the country. The company has seen high resident retention, low turnover, and decent financial performance, with a 29-year history of dividend payments. Although the dividend yield may be unattractive, the discount to NAV presents an opportunity right now.

title: Winners Of REIT Earnings Season
text: Beneath the "Rates Down, REITs Up" whipsaw effects, REIT earnings results were stronger than expected across most property sectors, particularly from retail, hotel, and technology REITs. Among the equity REITs that provided updated guidance, 82% increased their forecast, while only 18% lowered their full-year NOI outlook - a beat rate that significantly exceeded the S&P 500. As predicted, mergers and acquisitions were a major theme, with several small and mid-cap REITs being acquired by larger peers - a trend that we expect to continue into 2024.

title: Equity Residential to Participate in Nareit Investor Conference
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that members of the Company's senior management team, including the Company's President and CEO, Mark J. Parrell, will participate in meetings with investors and analysts at the Nareit REITworld 2023 Investor Conference. In connection with these meetings, the Company has posted an updated Investor Presentation to the Investor section of the Company's website at www.equityapartments.com. About Equity Residential Equity Resi.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Lags Q3 FFO Estimates, Trims '23 View
text: Equity Residential's (EQR) Q3 results reflect a weak performance in its West Coast market, along with the Rite Aid bankruptcy.

title: Major landlords, RealPage sued in DC for alleged rent fixing scheme
text: D.C. Attorney General Brian Schwalb announced a lawsuit against 14 landlords in the district and RealPage for allegedly illegally raising rent prices.
